text.title: Cassandra Wide-Column Modeling Patterns Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) + valid/invalid examples + forbidden patterns for nosql-cassandra-patterns output.

example.note: monotonic partition key (day alone); clustering_keys missing; queries missing; partition_keys_high_cardinality missing; ALLOW FILTERING permitted.

list.item: wildcard / placeholder values where enum or pattern is required
values outside numeric / enum / pattern bounds
